data.generation.py:
"""Pydantic schemas for UI Generation API."""
from datetime import datetime
from enum import Enum
from typing import Optional, Any
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field, ConfigDict


class GenerationStatus(str, Enum):
    """Status of a generation request."""

    PENDING = "pending"
    IN_PROGRESS = "in_progress"
    SUCCESS = "success"
    FAILURE = "failure"
    TIMEOUT = "timeout"
    ERROR = "error"


class GenerationOptions(BaseModel):
    """Options for UI generation."""

    model: Optional[str] = Field(
        default=None,
        description="AI model to use (defaults to configured model)"
    )

    temperature: Optional[float] = Field(
        default=None,
        ge=0.0,
        le=2.0,
        description="Sampling temperature for generation"
    )

    max_tokens: Optional[int] = Field(
        default=None,
        ge=1,
        le=4096,
        description="Maximum tokens to generate"
    )


class GenerationRequest(BaseModel):
    """Schema for UI generation request."""

    model_config = ConfigDict(extra='forbid')

    prompt: str = Field(
        ...,
        min_length=1,
        max_length=5000,
        description="Natural language description of the UI to generate"
    )

    component_type: Optional[str] = Field(
        default=None,
        max_length=100,
        description="Specific component type (e.g., 'form', 'dashboard')"
    )

    design_guidelines: Optional[list[int]] = Field(
        default=None,
        description="IDs of design guidelines to apply"
    )

    context: Optional[dict[str, Any]] = Field(
        default=None,
        description="Additional context for generation"
    )

    options: Optional[GenerationOptions] = Field(
        default=None,
        description="Generation options (model, temperature, etc.)"
    )

    max_retries: Optional[int] = Field(
        default=None,
        ge=0,
        le=10,
        description="Maximum retry attempts on failure"
    )


class GenerationResponse(BaseModel):
    """Schema for UI generation response."""

    model_config = ConfigDict(from_attributes=True)

    request_id: str = Field(..., description="Unique request identifier")
    status: GenerationStatus = Field(..., description="Current status")

    # Output (if successful)
    ui_definition_id: Optional[int] = Field(None, description="Created UI definition ID")
    definition: Optional[dict[str, Any]] = Field(None, description="Generated UI definition")

    # Error information (if failed)
    error_message: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="Error message")
    error_type: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="Error classification")

    # Metadata
    model_used: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="AI model version used")
    attempt_number: int = Field(..., ge=1, description="Attempt number")

    # Metrics
    tokens_input: Optional[int] = Field(None, ge=0, description="Input tokens")
    tokens_output: Optional[int] = Field(None, ge=0, description="Output tokens")
    tokens_total: Optional[int] = Field(None, ge=0, description="Total tokens")
    generation_time_ms: Optional[int] = Field(None, ge=0, description="Generation time in ms")

    # Timestamps
    created_at: datetime = Field(..., description="Request start timestamp")
    completed_at: Optional[datetime] = Field(None, description="Request completion timestamp")

    # Debug information
    llm_request: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="Full LLM request for debugging")
    llm_response: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="Full LLM response for debugging")


class GenerationValidationError(BaseModel):
    """Schema for validation error details."""

    field: str = Field(..., description="Field with validation error")
    message: str = Field(..., description="Error message")
    value: Optional[Any] = Field(None, description="Invalid value")


class GenerationMetrics(BaseModel):
    """Schema for generation metrics and analytics."""

    total_requests: int = Field(..., ge=0, description="Total generation requests")
    successful_requests: int = Field(..., ge=0, description="Successful generations")
    failed_requests: int = Field(..., ge=0, description="Failed generations")
    success_rate: float = Field(..., ge=0.0, le=100.0, description="Success rate percentage")
    avg_generation_time_ms: Optional[float] = Field(None, ge=0, description="Average generation time")
    avg_tokens_used: Optional[float] = Field(None, ge=0, description="Average tokens per request")
